title: Rustic Crunchy Spanish Potato Omelette
description: A hearty, paleo-friendly tortilla with crispy potatoes, minced garlic, and a savory sea salt kick.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice 300g russet potatoes into 3mm rings.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the sliced potatoes, season with 1 teaspoon of shio salt, and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden and crispy, about 10 minutes.
While potatoes cook, whisk 4 eggs with 1 minced garlic clove, 1/2 teaspoon black pepper and a pinch of shio salt until blended.
When potatoes are nearly done, pour the whisked egg mixture over them, spreading evenly across the skillet.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until the eggs set and the top is slightly golden, about 6 minutes.
Remove the skillet from heat and let the tortilla rest for 2 minutes before slicing.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve warm.
